regions.text: Most of the energy man uses comes from the sun through photosynthesis. Scientists know only a little so far, but scientific knowledge is increasing all the time.
The rate at which scientific knowledge is increasing is going up all the time.
In time it may be possible to use light energy in industry as plants do in their cells. since: from the time when. industry: making things on a large scale.
scientific: to do with science. wait: be waiting. FUTURE: will wait. PRESENT: wait(s). PAST: waited.
